title: The Plan to Strike Big Mom
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Jinbe, Sanji, Luffy, Big Mom as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Pekoms protests!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whole cake island, East Bay

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where in the hell are you lot planning on going? Gaoh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're leaving this country.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, man. Try to get found by someone sooner rather than later.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell?! Does Mama Know About All This?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course not! We'd be in deep water if she did!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "All who leave, die!" That's big mom's modus operandi, isn't it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Jinbe was grateful to you, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's honestly a miracle that

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was able to hear Pekoms' story like this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our big mom assassination plan might not go off,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But to know that big mom was planning her own germa assassination plan...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If Luffy and the others find out about this,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're sure to try some- thing crazy to save Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I can't just sit idly by and let their lives be put in danger! I'm going to help them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which means, I am going to commit full-on mutiny

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: And betray big mom!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At first, I tried to do the honorable thing and inform her of my departure face-to-face.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But she dragged out that blasted roulette wheel, and on it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There were numbers written! Each represented the number of crew members that'd be sacrificed with me should that number be chosen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big mom intends her settlement price to be more than just my life alone! An ABCo- Lutely Dragonian Punishment!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which is why I want you all to run!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On the day of the tea party, Mama's hors d'oeuverre interpreter ships will all be tied up escorting guests!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The security for the rest of her territory will be light! And if something happens at that tea party,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone's attention will be even more focused on the party! And there's your chance!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're prepared to do all that. I don't mind, jinbe.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will do what we can to ensure that you can be free.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah. I know.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No you don't, damn it! You're gearing up to die

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If you have to! I can tell!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's just say... that somewhere down the line, I join the straw hat pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd intend to use my very life to protect my captain, straw hat luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And, Aldine ...whether or not I do that is not a question of if. It's a question of when!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Fine. Do as you wish.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, at least try to do your best

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: To protect your own life, too! Okay?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll take the boat and head back to fishman island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're worried too, aren't you? About the Ryugu kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit that! We've known each other for years, now, man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We'll meet again, alive! Right, jinbe?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hurry! Get ready to set sail!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WOA- Arrgh- HHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oi! Hold it, you bastards!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 46 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
